subject: [PATCH v3 3/4] sunrpc: guarantee a thread per CPU-bearing node when auto-distributing

2026-06-29.patch_summary: This patch ensures that each CPU-bearing node in a NUMA system has at least one thread when distributing RPC threads automatically. When the requested number of threads is less than the number of pools, some nodes might have empty pools due to even distribution. This patch floors each pool's thread count at one if it belongs to a CPU-bearing node, preventing transports from being steered to empty pools. The total number of threads may exceed the requested count as a result. This change only affects automatic thread distribution and does not impact explicit per-pool thread counts set by callers.
